meta.title: How to Start Making AI Videos in 2026
meta.description:
Master AI Video Generators & AI image Generators in 2026
Best beginner AI Tool 👉  https://openart.ai/home?ref=beginnercourse


How To get Started as a complete beginner with AI Video generators. In this video I teach you everything you need to know regarding AI prompting, Ai image generating and Ai video generation. The first choice you gotta make is choosing the right AI Tool, next up you need to learn how to prompt, then we can start with ai image generation and lastly we got AI video generating.

Join my FREE community where you can find my prompts & chat about AI
👉 https://www.skool.com/nextgenai
